name: Ben Carson
subject: "We the People" looks like this...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28247022:27135840414:m:1:876315805:23957FC5C373F8B2A11A4D62632E7019:r)
---
|

Peter,

"We the People." It's not just a phrase. These are the first three words of our Constitution.

By opening with these three simple words, our Founders were making it clear to the world that America would be different. In America, the citizens would be the center of power, and government would only act with our consent.

**I am running for President because too many people in Washington have forgotten.**

My campaign is rapidly gaining momentum because there are millions of Americans who are tired of the status quo, and the political class that enables it.

**Take a look at the pictures below. Every single day we receive pictures from people just like you, letting us know that they stand with me and my message of hope and revival.**

It's incredibly inspiring, and it reinforces a simple point. You, as a hardworking American citizen, are the fuel of this campaign. If we are successful, and are able to fix our nation's problems, it will be you that made it possible.

|
---

So many of you have told me that you're with me. But I want you to know that I am with you as well. It is your voice and your priorities that I am seeking to bolster.

**I thank you for your prayers, your participation,**[**and your generous and ongoing support that makes this all possible**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28247022:27135840414:m:1:876315805:23957FC5C373F8B2A11A4D62632E7019:r)**.**

Together, we are going to make history.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28247022:27135840414:m:1:876315805:23957FC5C373F8B2A11A4D62632E7019:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28247023:27135840414:m:1:876315805:23957FC5C373F8B2A11A4D62632E7019:r)
---

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: Building the Grassroots Wave
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the following address: http://act.tedcruz.org/index.php/email/emailWebview?mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonvqrBZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4ARcpnI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D

Hello Friend,

Last weekend, Ted visited New Hampshire and Massachusetts where he met with Granite and Bay Staters in campaign stops through those states that were reported <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/ted-on-the-trail-cruz-draws-large-crowds-in-new-hampshire-and-massachusetts/> to have had attendees erupting in raucous cheers. Rather than just tell you about it, I thought I'd show you <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TueuWTopwIk>.

In the Senate, Ted chaired a government oversight hearing on the illegal Obamacare rule-making process -- a topic that is at the heart of an upcoming major decision by the U.S. Supreme Court. Sadly, in a show of contempt for the American people, the Obama Administration's witnesses failed to even show up to the hearing <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/washington-times-ted-cruz-empty-witness-table-shows-contempt-for-americans/>.

Thursday afternoon, Ted appeared on Your World with Neil Cavuto to discuss the current state of the race for the Republican nomination for President in 2016 where he noted, “We are competing nationwide. We’re putting together a team on the ground, a grassroots team nationwide, and we’re raising money in all 50 states. Over 100,000 people have gone to tedcruz.org [and] supported the campaign." You can watch the interview here <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rArmhzK2VCU>.

Finally, Ted will wrap up this week campaigning in North Carolina where he met with grassroots leaders <https://www.facebook.com/tedcruzpage/posts/10153348947382464> yesterday, and speaks at the North Carolina Republican Party's State Convention today. As you can see <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TueuWTopwIk>, in campaign stops across the country, a grassroots wave is building to rise up and reignite the promise of America -- and we're thrilled to have you be a part of it!

All the best,

Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President
Press Clips

Cruz Aims to Awaken State's Reagan Democrats
Livingston Daily <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/livingston-daily-cruz-aims-to-awaken-states-reagan-democrats/>

Ted Cruz Calls for U.S. Embassy in Jerusalem
WND <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/wnd-ted-cruz-calls-for-u-s-embassy-in-jerusalem/>

A Grassroots Message; GOP Presidential Hopeful Ted Cruz Brings Campaign to Andover
The Andover Townsman <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/the-andover-townsman-a-grassroots-message-gop-presidential-hopeful-ted-cruz-brings-campaign-to-andover/>

Cruz Kicks Off Busy Massachusetts Republican Presidential Primary
Red Mass Group <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/red-mass-group-cruz-kicks-off-busy-massachusetts-republican-presidential-primary/>

Cruz Has Mass. Appeal During Campaign Stop
Boston Herald <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/boston-herald-cruz-has-mass-appeal-during-campaign-stop/>

Sen. Ted Cruz: Next President Should Immediately Reimpose Sanctions on Iran
Breitbart <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/breitbart-sen-ted-cruz-next-president-should-immediately-reimpose-sanctions-on-iran/>

Ted Cruz: We Need a President Who Will Say Either Iran Stops its Nuke Program or America Will
Right Scoop <https://www.tedcruz.org/press/right-scoop-ted-cruz-we-need-a-president-who-will-say-either-iran-stops-its-nuke-program-or-america-will/>
CRUZ VIDEOS

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rArmhzK2VCU>

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TueuWTopwIk>

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jg51rJYJoSI>

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CZMgy2FrNo8>
Courageous Conservatives

Reigniting the Promise of America

Copyright 2015 All Rights Reserved | Privacy Policy <http://www.tedcruz.org/privacy-policy/>
PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www.tedcruz.org <http://www.tedcruz.org>
P.O. Box 25376, Houston, TX 77265 | (713) 353-4330

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to receive these emails you may unsubscribe here: http://act.tedcruz.org/UnsubscribePage.html?mkt_unsubscribe=1&mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonvqrBZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4ARcpnI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: A powerful ally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Did you see the good news? Friend -- Senator Cory Booker endorsed my campaign for U.S. Senate this week. He's one of the Democratic Party's rising stars, and I'm honored to have his support. I want to make sure you saw the good news. Cory is a powerful voice for a new generation of leaders in Washington. I look forward to serving with him in the U.S. Senate. With attacks on me from right-wing groups already on TV, we have a tough campaign ahead of us. Will you help provide the resources we need to win this campaign? _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-06-06_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[Chip in $35 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-06-06_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[Chip in $250 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?refcode=ema_2015-06-06_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you for your support, Patrick Murphy
| **[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?refcode=ema_2015-06-06_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

_\-- Begin forwarded message --_
**From** : Cory Booker
**Subject** : Why I'm on Team Murphy
Friend --
I am excited to endorse Patrick Murphy for the U.S. Senate.
**We need fresh new leadership like Patrick's to tackle this nation's challenges.** He will be a champion for working families, women, and seniors in Florida and across the country, and his long-term vision to help the middle class is exactly what we need right now.
That's why I support Patrick. He can win this race -- but not without our help. Will you join me, and contribute to Patrick's campaign today?
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._
**[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-06-06_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
**[Chip in $35 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_ema_2015-06-06_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=35&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
**[Chip in $50 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_ema_2015-06-06_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
**[Chip in $100 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-06-06_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
**[Chip in $250 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-06-06_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?refcode=ema_2015-06-06_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I look forward to working with Patrick in the Senate, and hope that you'll help get him there.
Thank you for your support,
Cory Booker
U.S. Senator

**[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?refcode=ema_2015-06-06_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
